---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-24"
---


```{r, echo=FALSE}
 library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(lmerTest)
library(lme4)
library(DHARMa)
Blood_count <- read_excel("smears_analysis_r_updated14.xlsx")
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    `total_cell` = `[Cells] c/ml`
  )
```



```{r, echo=FALSE}
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    `Shark_Id` = `Sharks Id`
  )
```


```{r}
Blood_count$Groupe[Blood_count$Groupe == "Control"] <- "Static"

```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    total_count        = `total count`
  )
```

```{r}
library(dplyr) # Make sure dplyr is loaded

# Fix: Explicitly pass the data frame as the first argument to rename()
Blood_count <- dplyr::rename(Blood_count, RBC_WBC = `rbc:wbc`)
```


```{r}
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Shark_Id))
```



```{r}
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    Lympho_wbc    = `Lympho_wbc%`,
    GT_wbc        = `GT_wbc%`,
    FE_wbc        = `FE_wbc%`,
    CE_wbc        = `CE_wbc%`,
    Neutro_wbc    = `Neutro_wbc%`,
    Monocyte_wbc  = `Monocyte_wbc%`,
    Basophil_wbc  = `basophil_wbc%`
  )

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

# Summary of WBC counts by group, across all weeks
wbc_group_summary <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(Groupe_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    Lympho_wbc_mean = mean(Lympho_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    Lympho_wbc_sd   = sd(Lympho_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    GT_wbc_mean     = mean(GT_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    GT_wbc_sd       = sd(GT_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    FE_wbc_mean     = mean(FE_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    FE_wbc_sd       = sd(FE_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    CE_wbc_mean     = mean(CE_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    CE_wbc_sd       = sd(CE_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    Neutro_wbc_mean = mean(Neutro_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    Neutro_wbc_sd   = sd(Neutro_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    Monocyte_wbc_mean = mean(Monocyte_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    Monocyte_wbc_sd   = sd(Monocyte_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    Basophil_wbc_mean = mean(Basophil_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    Basophil_wbc_sd   = sd(Basophil_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
wbc_group_summary
week8_means <- Blood_count %>%
    filter(week_factor == 8) %>%
    group_by(Groupe_factor) %>%
    summarise(mean_neutro = mean(Neutro_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
               sd(Neutro_wbc, na.rm = TRUE)
              
              )

week8_means
```



```{r}

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)
library(lme4)

# ----------------------------
# 0) Prepare factors + colors (same as your code)
# ----------------------------
Blood_count$Groupe[Blood_count$Groupe == "Control"] <- "Static"
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  mutate(
    Groupe_factor = factor(Groupe, levels = c("Winter", "Static", "Summer")),
    week_factor  = factor(week, levels = c("4", "6", "8")),
    Shark_Id_factor = factor(Shark_Id),
    Sex_factor = factor(Sex)
  )
group_colors <- c("Winter" = "#FFF5E6", "Static" = "#FDB888", "Summer" = "#B30000")

# ----------------------------
# 1) Fit LMM
# ----------------------------
lmm_RBCWBC <- lmer(RBC_WBC ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1|Shark_Id), data = Blood_count)

# ----------------------------
# 2) Letters for groups within week (lowercase)
# ----------------------------
emm_groups_week <- emmeans(lmm_RBCWBC, ~ Groupe_factor | week_factor)
letters_week <- cld(emm_groups_week, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(.group = gsub(" ", "", .group))

# ----------------------------
# 3) Compute pairwise contrasts for weeks within group (for brackets)
# ----------------------------
emm_weeks_group <- emmeans(lmm_RBCWBC, pairwise ~ week_factor | Groupe_factor, adjust = "tukey")
pw_weeks <- summary(emm_weeks_group$contrasts)

# Add significance stars
pw_weeks <- pw_weeks %>%
  mutate(signif = case_when(
    p.value < 0.0001 ~ "****",
    p.value < 0.001  ~ "***",
    p.value < 0.01   ~ "**",
    p.value < 0.05   ~ "*",
    TRUE             ~ "n.s."
  ))

# Keep only positive estimates (optional)
pw_weeks <- pw_weeks %>% filter(estimate > 0)

# Separate week names
pw_weeks <- pw_weeks %>%
  separate(contrast, into = c("week1","week2"), sep = " - ") %>%
  mutate(
    week1 = factor(week1, levels = c("4","6","8")),
    week2 = factor(week2, levels = c("4","6","8")),
    Groupe_factor = factor(Groupe_factor, levels = c("Winter","Static","Summer"))
  )

# ----------------------------
# 4) Compute boxplot stats for letter + bracket positions
# ----------------------------
box_stats <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(week_factor, Groupe_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    ymin = min(RBC_WBC, na.rm = TRUE),
    ymax = max(RBC_WBC, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Add letter positions
letters_week <- left_join(letters_week, box_stats, by = c("week_factor","Groupe_factor")) %>%
  mutate(y_pos = ymax + 0.05*(ymax - ymin))

# Compute bracket positions
dodge_width <- 0.75
group_levels <- levels(Blood_count$Groupe_factor)
n_groups <- length(group_levels)

brackets_weeks_pos <- pw_weeks %>%
  left_join(box_stats, by = c("week1"="week_factor", "Groupe_factor")) %>%
  mutate(
    x_start_num = as.numeric(week1) - dodge_width/2 + (match(Groupe_factor, group_levels)-0.5)*(dodge_width/n_groups),
    x_end_num   = as.numeric(week2) - dodge_width/2 + (match(Groupe_factor, group_levels)-0.5)*(dodge_width/n_groups),
    x_mid_num   = (x_start_num + x_end_num)/2,
    y_pos       = ymax + 0.05*(ymax)  # slightly above top
  )

# ----------------------------
# 5) Plot RBC/WBC with letters + brackets
# ----------------------------
p_RBCWBC <- ggplot(Blood_count, aes(x = week_factor, y = RBC_WBC, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Groupe_factor),
             shape = 21, size = 2, stroke = 0.5,
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1, dodge.width = dodge_width),
             alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_text(
    data = letters_week,
    aes(x = week_factor, y = y_pos, label = .group, group = Groupe_factor),
    position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
    vjust = 0, size = 6
  ) +
  # Brackets
  geom_segment(data = brackets_weeks_pos,
               aes(x = x_start_num, xend = x_end_num, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_segment(data = brackets_weeks_pos,
               aes(x = x_start_num, xend = x_start_num, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos-0.02),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_segment(data = brackets_weeks_pos,
               aes(x = x_end_num, xend = x_end_num, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos-0.02),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(data = brackets_weeks_pos,
            aes(x = x_mid_num, y = y_pos+0.02, label = signif),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Winter"="black","Static"="black","Summer"="black"), guide="none") +
  labs(x = "", y = "RBC/WBC Ratio", fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.8),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
   legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3), 
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Week 4","Week 6","Week 8")) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

print(p_RBCWBC)


```


```{r}
library(ggsignif)

# ----------------------------
# 1) Prepare single comparison table
# ----------------------------
sig_bracket <- data.frame(
  week1 = "4",                   # week_factor for x-axis start
  week2 = "8",                   # week_factor for x-axis end
  Groupe_factor = "Static",      # group where comparison is done
  y_position = max(Blood_count$RBC_WBC[Blood_count$Groupe_factor == "Static"], na.rm = TRUE) + 3.5, # adjust offset above box
  annotations = "**"             # significance stars
)

# ----------------------------
# 2) Plot with bracket
# ----------------------------
p_RBCWBC_png <- p_RBCWBC + 
  geom_signif(
    data = sig_bracket,
    aes(xmin = week1, xmax = week2, annotations = annotations, y_position = y_position),
    manual = TRUE,
    tip_length = 0.03,
     textsize = 6
  )
ggsave(
  filename = "RBCWBC_bracket.png",
  plot = p_RBCWBC_png,
  width = 15,
  height = 12,
  dpi = 300
)
```



```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(dplyr)
library(multcomp)
library(emmeans)

# ----------------------------
# 0) Factors + Colors
# ----------------------------

Blood_count$Groupe_factor <- factor(
  Blood_count$Groupe_factor,
  levels = c("Winter", "Static", "Summer")
)
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  mutate(
    GLR1 = `[granulocyte_no_gt]` / `[Lympho]`,
    Groupe_factor = factor(Groupe),
    week_factor = factor(week),
    Sex_factor = factor(Sex),
    Shark_Id_factor = factor(Shark_Id)
  )

Blood_count$week_factor <- factor(
  Blood_count$week_factor,
  levels = c("4", "6", "8")
)

group_colors <- c("Winter" = "#FFF5E6", 
                  "Static" = "#FDB888",
                  "Summer" = "#B30000")


box_stats <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(week_factor, Groupe_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    ymax = max(GLR1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
# ----------------------------
# 1) emmeans for groups within weeks (lowercase letters)
# ----------------------------
emm_groups_week <- emmeans(lmm_GLR, ~ Groupe_factor | week_factor)
letters_week <- cld(emm_groups_week, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(
    .group = gsub(" ", "", .group)
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    Blood_count %>% 
      group_by(week_factor, Groupe_factor) %>%
      summarise(y_max = max(GLR, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop"),
    by = c("week_factor", "Groupe_factor")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    y_pos = y_max + 0.02*diff(range(Blood_count$GLR, na.rm = TRUE))  # small offset
  )

# ----------------------------
# 2) Capital letters (bold): Weeks within same group
# ----------------------------
emm_weeks_group <- emmeans(lmm_GLR, ~ week_factor | Groupe_factor)
letters_weeks <- cld(emm_weeks_group, Letters = LETTERS, adjust = "tukey") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(
    .group = gsub(" ", "", .group)
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    Blood_count %>% 
      group_by(week_factor, Groupe_factor) %>%
      summarise(y_max = max(GLR, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop"),
    by = c("week_factor", "Groupe_factor")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    y_pos = y_max + 0.08*diff(range(Blood_count$GLR, na.rm = TRUE))  # slightly higher offset
  )

# ----------------------------
# 3) Flatten y-axis range a bit
# ----------------------------
y_min <- min(Blood_count$GLR, na.rm = TRUE)
y_max <- max(Blood_count$GLR, na.rm = TRUE)*1.1  # slightly compressed

# ----------------------------
# 4) GLR Plot
# ----------------------------
p_GLR <- ggplot(Blood_count, aes(x = week_factor, y = GLR, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.colour = "black",
               outlier.shape = NA,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.75)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Groupe_factor),
             shape = 21, size = 2, stroke = 0.5,
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1, dodge.width = 0.75),
             alpha = 0.8) +
  
  # Lowercase letters for groups within week
  geom_text(data = letters_week,
            aes(x = week_factor, y = y_pos, label = .group, group = Groupe_factor),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
            vjust = -0.3, size = 4) +

  
  labs(y = "GLR", x = "Week", fill = "Group") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Winter"="black","Static"="black","Summer"="black"), guide="none") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
        axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 5.5, l = 5.5, unit = "pt")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(y_min, y_max), clip = "off")

print(p_GLR)


```
```{r}
library(ggsignif)

# ----------------------------
# 1) Prepare single comparison table
# ----------------------------
sig_bracket2 <- data.frame(
  week1 = "4",                   # week_factor for x-axis start
  week2 = "8",                   # week_factor for x-axis end
  Groupe_factor = "Static",      # group where comparison is done
  y_position = max(Blood_count$GLR1[Blood_count$Groupe_factor == "Static"], na.rm = TRUE) + 0.20, # adjust offset above box
  annotations = "***"             # significance stars
)

# ----------------------------
# 2) Plot with bracket
# ----------------------------
p_GLR1_png <- p_GLR1 + 
  geom_signif(
    data = sig_bracket2,
    aes(xmin = week1, xmax = week2, annotations = annotations, y_position = y_position),
    manual = TRUE,
    tip_length = 0.03,
     textsize = 6
  )
ggsave(
  filename = "GLR1_bracket.png",
  plot = p_GLR1_png,
  width = 15,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)
```


```{r}
library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# ----------------------------
# 0) Prepare factors + colors
# ----------------------------
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  mutate(
    GLR = `[Granulocyte]` / `[Lympho]`,  # replace with correct column names
    Groupe_factor = factor(Groupe),
    week_factor = factor(week),
    Sex_factor = factor(Sex),
    Shark_Id_factor = factor(Shark_Id)
  )

Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  mutate(
    Groupe_factor = factor(Groupe_factor, levels = c("Winter", "Static", "Summer")),
    week_factor  = factor(week_factor, levels = c("4", "6", "8"))
  )


group_colors <- c("Winter" = "#FFF5E6", 
                  "Static" = "#FDB888",
                  "Summer" = "#B30000")

# ----------------------------
# 1) Fit Linear Mixed Model
# ----------------------------
lmm_glr <- lmer(GLR ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1|Shark_Id), 
                data = Blood_count)
print(lmm_glr)
summary(lmm_glr)
Anova(lmm_glr)
# ----------------------------
# 2) Pairwise comparisons
# ----------------------------
# 2a) Groups within week (lowercase letters)
emm_groups_week <- emmeans(lmm_glr, ~ Groupe_factor | week_factor)

letters_week <- cld(emm_groups_week, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey", sort = TRUE) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(.group = gsub(" ", "", .group))


# ----------------------------
# 3) Compute boxplot stats for positioning letters
# ----------------------------
box_stats <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(week_factor, Groupe_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    ymin   = min(GLR, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower  = quantile(GLR, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    middle = median(GLR, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper  = quantile(GLR, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    ymax   = max(GLR, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

letters_week <- left_join(letters_week, box_stats, by = c("week_factor", "Groupe_factor")) %>%
  mutate(y_pos = ymax + 0.04*(ymax - ymin))  # 5% above top



# ----------------------------
# 5) Plot GLR
# ----------------------------
p_GLR <- ggplot(Blood_count, aes(x = week_factor, y = GLR, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, position = position_dodge(width = 0.75)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Groupe_factor),
             shape = 21, size = 2, stroke = 0.5,
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1, dodge.width = 0.75),
             alpha = 0.8) +
  # Lowercase letters (groups within week)
  geom_text(data = letters_week, 
            aes(x = week_factor, y = y_pos, label = .group, group = Groupe_factor),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
            vjust = 0, size = 4) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Winter"="black","Static"="black","Summer"="black"),
                     guide = "none") +
  labs(y = "GLR", x = "Week", fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 5.5, l = 5.5, unit = "pt")
  )

print(p_GLR)

mean_glr <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(Groupe_factor, week_factor) %>%  # group by your factors
  summarise(
    mean_GLR = mean(GLR, na.rm = TRUE),     # calculate mean, ignoring NAs
    sd_GLR   = sd(GLR, na.rm = TRUE),       # optional: standard deviation
    n        = n()                          # optional: sample size
  )

# View results
print(mean_glr)

mean_glr_group <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(Groupe_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_GLR = mean(GLR, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_GLR   = sd(GLR, na.rm = TRUE),
    n        = n()
  )

print(mean_glr_group)
```
```{r}
emmeans(lmm_GLR, pairwise ~ week_factor | Groupe_factor, adjust = "sidak")
```

```{r}
library(ggsignif)

# ----------------------------
# 1) Prepare single comparison table
# ----------------------------
sig_bracket1 <- data.frame(
  week1 = "4",                   # week_factor for x-axis start
  week2 = "8",                   # week_factor for x-axis end
  Groupe_factor = "Winter",      # group where comparison is done
  y_position = max(Blood_count$total_cell[Blood_count$Groupe_factor == "Winter"], na.rm = TRUE) + 3.5, # adjust offset above box
  annotations = "***"             # significance stars
)

# ----------------------------
# 2) Plot with bracket
# ----------------------------
p_total_cell_png <- p_total_cell + 
  geom_signif(
    data = sig_bracket1,
    aes(xmin = week1, xmax = week2, annotations = annotations, y_position = y_position),
    manual = TRUE,
    tip_length = 0.03,
    textsize = 6
  )

# ----------------------------
# 3) Export PNG
# ----------------------------
ggsave(
  filename = "Total_cells_Winter_bracket.png",
  plot = p_total_cell_png,
  width = 15,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

```

```{r}
library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  mutate(
    GLR1 = `[granulocyte_no_gt]` / `[Lympho]`,
    Groupe_factor = factor(Groupe),
    week_factor = factor(week),
    Sex_factor = factor(Sex),
    Shark_Id_factor = factor(Shark_Id)
  )

# ----------------------------
# 0) Prepare factors + colors
# ----------------------------
Blood_count$Groupe_factor <- factor(Blood_count$Groupe_factor,
                                    levels = c("Winter", "Static", "Summer"))
Blood_count$week_factor <- factor(Blood_count$week_factor,
                                  levels = c("4", "6", "8"))

group_colors <- c("Winter" = "#FFF5E6", 
                  "Static" = "#FDB888",
                  "Summer" = "#B30000")

# ----------------------------
# 1) Fit Linear Mixed Model
# ----------------------------
# Random effect for shark id if needed
lmm_glr1 <- lmer(GLR1 ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1|Shark_Id), data = Blood_count)
print(lmm_glr1)
summary(lmm_glr1)
anova(lmm_glr1)
# ----------------------------
# 2) Pairwise comparisons
# ----------------------------
# 2a) Groups within week (lowercase letters)
emm_groups_week <- emmeans(lmm_glr1, ~ Groupe_factor | week_factor)
letters_week <- cld(emm_groups_week, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(.group = gsub(" ", "", .group))



# ----------------------------
# 3) Compute boxplot stats for positioning letters
# ----------------------------
box_stats <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(week_factor, Groupe_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    ymin   = min(GLR1, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower  = quantile(GLR1, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    middle = median(GLR1, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper  = quantile(GLR1, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    ymax   = max(GLR1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Merge CLDs with box stats
letters_week <- left_join(letters_week, box_stats, by = c("week_factor", "Groupe_factor")) %>%
  mutate(y_pos = ymax + 0.05*(ymax - ymin))  # 5% above top


# ----------------------------
# 4) Plot GLR1
# ----------------------------
p_GLR1 <- ggplot(Blood_count, aes(x = week_factor, y = GLR1, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, position = position_dodge(width = 0.75)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Groupe_factor),
             shape = 21, size = 2, stroke = 0.5,
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1, dodge.width = 0.75),
             alpha = 0.8) +
  # Lowercase letters (groups within week)
  geom_text(data = letters_week, 
            aes(x = week_factor, y = y_pos, label = .group, group = Groupe_factor),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
            vjust = 0, size = 4) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Winter"="black","Static"="black","Summer"="black"),
                     guide = "none") +
  labs(y = "GLR1", x = "Week", fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 5.5, l = 5.5, unit = "pt")
  )

print(p_GLR1)

print(p_GLR)

mean_glr1 <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(Groupe_factor, week_factor) %>%  # group by your factors
  summarise(
    mean_GLR1 = mean(GLR1, na.rm = TRUE),     # calculate mean, ignoring NAs
    sd_GLR1   = sd(GLR1, na.rm = TRUE),       # optional: standard deviation
    n        = n()                          # optional: sample size
  )

# View results
print(mean_glr1)

mean_glr1_group <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(Groupe_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_GLR1 = mean(GLR1, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_GLR1   = sd(GLR1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n        = n()
  )

print(mean_glr1_group)

```



```{r}
library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)

# Remove y-axis for GLR1
p_GLR1_noy <- p_GLR1_png  + 
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),  # remove y-axis labe  # remove y-axis text
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()   # remove y-axis ticks
  )

# Add identifiers
p_GLR_labelled  <- p_GLR_png   + 
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = max(Blood_count$GLR, na.rm = TRUE)*1.15, 
           label = "A", fontface = "bold", size = 6, hjust = 0)

p_GLR1_labelled <- p_GLR1_noy + 
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = max(Blood_count$GLR1, na.rm = TRUE)*1.15, 
           label = "B", fontface = "bold", size = 6, hjust = 0)

# Combine side by side
combined_plot <- p_GLR_labelled + p_GLR1_labelled +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides = "collect") &    # single legend
  theme(legend.position = "right",
         legend.title = element_blank())

# Print
print(combined_plot)

# Export wider
ggsave("combined_GLR_plot.png", combined_plot, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```


```{r}
library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(stringr)

# ----------------------------
# 0) Factors + Colors
# ----------------------------
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  mutate(
    Groupe_factor = factor(Groupe, levels = c("Winter", "Static", "Summer")),
    week_factor  = factor(week, levels = c("4", "6", "8")),
    Shark_Id_factor = factor(Shark_Id),
    Sex_factor = factor(Sex)
  )

custom_colors <- c("Winter" = "#FFF5E6", 
                   "Static" = "#FDB888", 
                   "Summer" = "#B30000")

# ----------------------------
# Function to run LMM, emmeans, and compute letters
# ----------------------------
run_barplot_lmm <- function(response_var, y_label) {
  
  # Fit LMM
  lmm <- lmer(as.formula(paste0(response_var, " ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1|Shark_Id_factor)")),
              data = Blood_count)
  
  # emmeans for groups within weeks (lowercase)
  emm_groups <- emmeans(lmm, ~ Groupe_factor | week_factor)
  letters_week <- cld(emm_groups, Letters = letters, adjust = "tukey") %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(.group = gsub(" ", "", .group))
  
  
  # Box stats for bar positioning
  emms_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans(lmm, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor))
  box_stats <- emms_df %>%
    group_by(Groupe_factor, week_factor) %>%
    summarise(y_max = max(emmean + SE), .groups = "drop")
  
  # Merge letters with stats
  letters_week <- left_join(letters_week, box_stats, by = c("Groupe_factor", "week_factor")) %>%
    mutate(y_pos = y_max + 0.02*max(y_max))  # small offset
  
   # higher offset for uppercase
  
  # Barplot
  p <- ggplot(emms_df, aes(x = week_factor, y = emmean, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), color = "black") +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = emmean - SE, ymax = emmean + SE),
                  width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_text(data = letters_week,
              aes(x = week_factor, y = y_pos, label = .group, group = Groupe_factor),
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.6),
              vjust = 0, size = 6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(x = "Week", y = y_label, fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  return(list(plot = p, model = lmm))
}

# ----------------------------
# 1) Lymphocytes (%)
# ----------------------------
res_lympho <- run_barplot_lmm("Lympho_wbc", "Predicted % WBC")
p_lympho <- res_lympho$plot
lmm_lympho <- res_lympho$model
summary (lmm_lympho)
print (lmm_lympho)
anova (lmm_lympho)
# ----------------------------
# 2) GT (%)
# ----------------------------
res_gt <- run_barplot_lmm("GT_wbc", "Predicted % WBC")
p_gt <- res_gt$plot
lmm_gt <- res_gt$model
summary (lmm_gt)
print(lmm_gt)
anova (lmm_gt)

# ----------------------------
# 3) FE (%)
# ----------------------------
res_fe <- run_barplot_lmm("FE_wbc", "Predicted % WBC")
p_fe <- res_fe$plot
lmm_fe <- res_fe$model
summary(lmm_fe)
print (lmm_fe)
anova(lmm_fe)


lmm_fe <- res_fe$model
summary(lmm_fe)
print (lmm_fe)
anova(lmm_fe)


# ----------------------------
# Optional: Combine plots using patchwork
# ----------------------------
```


```{r}
res_neutro <- run_barplot_lmm("Neutro_wbc", "Predicted % WBC")
p_neutro <- res_neutro$plot
lmm_neutro <- res_neutro$model

res_monocyte<- run_barplot_lmm("mono_wbc", "Predicted % WBC")
p_monocyte <- res_moncoyte$plot
res_mono1 <- run_barplot_lmm("Monocyte_wbc", "Predicted % WBC")
p_Monocyte1 <- res_monocyte$plot
p_Monocyte1 <- p_Monocyte1 + 
  theme(
    axis.line = element_blank()  # removes numbers but keeps ticks
  )
lmm_monocyte1<- res_monocyte$model

res_CE <- run_barplot_lmm("CE_wbc", "Predicted % WBC")
p_CE <- res_CE$plot
lmm_CE<- res_CE$model


# Plot
print(p_neutro)
print(p_Monocyte1)
print(p_CE)
```




```{r}
res_total_cell <- run_barplot_lmm("total_cell", "Total blood cell count")
p_total_cell <- res_total_cell$plot
lmm_total_cell<- res_total_cell$model
emms_total_cell <- emmeans(lmm_total_cell, specs = ~ week_factor | Groupe_factor)

# Pairwise comparisons of weeks within each treatment group
pairs_total_cell <- pairs(emms_total_cell , adjust = "tukey")
print(pairs_total_cell)

emms_total_cell_week_group <- emmeans(lmm_total_cell, specs  = ~ Groupe_factor | week_factor)

overall_groups_total_cell<- pairs(emmeans(lmm_total_cell, ~ Groupe_factor), adjust = "tukey")
overall_weeks_total_cell <- pairs(emmeans(lmm_total_cell, ~ week_factor), adjust = "tukey")
overall_groups_total_cell
overall_weeks_total_cell
pairs_total_cell_week_group
# Pairwise comparisons of groups within each level of week_factor (Tukey adjustment)
pairs_total_cell_week_group <- pairs(emms_total_cell_week_group, adjust = "tukey")


print (lmm_total_cell)
summary(lmm_total_cell)
anova(lmm_total_cell)
p_Total_cell <- p_total_cell + 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 22),   # increase X axis numbers
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 22),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 26),   # X-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 26),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 26),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = "white")
  ) 

ggsave(
  filename = "Figure_total_cell.png",  # change filename as needed
  plot = p_Total_cell,
  width = 20,   # total width in inches
  height = 20,  # total height in inches
  dpi = 300     # high resolution
)

# Export as PDF
ggsave(
  filename = "Figure_total_cell.pdf",
  plot = p_Total_cell,
  width = 25,
  height = 17
)
print(p_Total_cell)

```





```{r}
library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# ----------------------------
# 0) Prepare factors & rank variables
# ----------------------------
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  mutate(
    week_factor = factor(week, levels = c("4","6","8")),
    Groupe_factor = factor(Groupe, levels = c("Winter","Static","Summer")),
    Shark_Id_factor = factor(Shark_Id),
    Sex_factor = factor(Sex),
    Monocyte_rank = rank(Monocyte_wbc),
    CE_rank = rank(CE_wbc)
  )

group_colors <- c("Winter" = "#FFF5E6", "Static" = "#FDB888", "Summer" = "#B30000")

# ----------------------------
# 1) Fit LMM on ranks (for stats only)
# ----------------------------
lmm_monocyte_rank <- lmer(Monocyte_rank ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1|Shark_Id_factor),
                          data = Blood_count)
lmm_ce_rank <- lmer(CE_rank ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1|Shark_Id_factor),
                    data = Blood_count)

# ----------------------------
# 2) EMMs and pairwise comparisons
# ----------------------------
# Monocyte
emms_monocyte <- emmeans(lmm_monocyte_rank, ~ Groupe_factor | week_factor)
letters_monocyte <- cld(emms_monocyte, Letters = letters, adjust = "bonferroni") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(.group = gsub(" ", "", .group))

emms_monocyte_weeks <- emmeans(lmm_monocyte_rank, ~ week_factor | Groupe_factor)
letters_monocyte_upper <- cld(emms_monocyte_weeks, Letters = LETTERS, adjust = "bonferroni") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(.group = gsub(" ", "", .group))

# CE
emms_ce <- emmeans(lmm_ce_rank, ~ Groupe_factor | week_factor)
letters_ce <- cld(emms_ce, Letters = letters, adjust = "bonferroni") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(.group = gsub(" ", "", .group))

emms_ce_weeks <- emmeans(lmm_ce_rank, ~ week_factor | Groupe_factor)
letters_ce_upper <- cld(emms_ce_weeks, Letters = LETTERS, adjust = "bonferroni") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(.group = gsub(" ", "", .group))

# ----------------------------
# 3) Summary stats for barplots (RAW data)
# ----------------------------
df_monocyte <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(week_factor, Groupe_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Monocyte_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(Monocyte_wbc, na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),
    ymax = max(Monocyte_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

df_ce <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(week_factor, Groupe_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(CE_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(CE_wbc, na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),
    ymax = max(CE_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ----------------------------
# 4) Monocyte barplot
# ----------------------------
p_monocyte <- ggplot(df_monocyte, aes(x = week_factor, y = mean, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se),
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.75)) +
  geom_text(data = letters_monocyte,
            aes(x = week_factor, y = df_monocyte$ymax*1.05, label = .group, group = Groupe_factor),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  labs(title = "Monocytes (%)", x = "Week") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = c(0.85,0.85),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA)
  )

# ----------------------------
# 5) CE barplot
# ----------------------------
p_ce <- ggplot(df_ce, aes(x = week_factor, y = mean, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se),
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.75)) +
  geom_text(data = letters_ce,
            aes(x = week_factor, y = df_ce$ymax*1.05, label = .group, group = Groupe_factor),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  labs(title = "CE (%)", x = "Week") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = c(0.85,0.85),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA)
  )

print(p_monocyte)
print(p_ce)

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(emmeans)
library(lme4)
library(stringr)

custom_colors <- c("Winter" = "#FFF5E6", 
                   "Static" = "#FDB888", 
                   "Summer" = "#B30000")

# raw data summary
raw_summary <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(Groupe_factor, week_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_val = mean(CE_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),   # replace CE_wbc with Monocyte_wbc for Monocyte
    SE = sd(CE_wbc, na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),
    max_val = max(CE_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# letters from EMMS (ranked model)
letters_df <- cld(emms_ce_rank, Letters = letters, adjust = "bonferroni") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(
    Groupe_factor = factor(Groupe_factor, levels = c("Winter", "Static", "Summer")),
    week_factor  = factor(week_factor, levels = c("4", "6", "8")),
    .group = gsub(" ", "", .group)
  )

# merge letters with raw summary for y-position
letters_df <- left_join(letters_df, raw_summary, by = c("Groupe_factor", "week_factor")) %>%
  arrange(week_factor, Groupe_factor) %>%   # ensure logical order
  mutate(
    y_pos_lower = pmin(max_val + 0.05*max(max_val), 0.22),# lower letters capped at 0.20
    y_pos_upper = pmin(max_val + 0.09*max(max_val), 0.28)   # upper letters capped at 0.25
  )

# Plot
p_CE <- ggplot(raw_summary, aes(x = week_factor, y = mean_val, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_val - SE, ymax = mean_val + SE),
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), linewidth = 0.8) +
  # Lowercase letters
  geom_text(data = letters_df,
            aes(x = week_factor, y = y_pos_lower, label = .group, group = Groupe_factor),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.6),
            vjust = 1.7, size = 4) +
  # Uppercase letters
  geom_text(data = letters_df,
            aes(x = week_factor, y = y_pos_upper, label = toupper(.group), group = Groupe_factor),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.6),
            vjust = 1.5, size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(x = "Week", y = "Predicted % WBC", fill = "Group") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = max(raw_summary$max_val)*1.15, label = "D", fontface = "bold", size = 6) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_CE)


```
```{r}
library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(stringr)

# ----------------------------
# 0) Factors + Colors
# ----------------------------
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  mutate(
    Groupe_factor = factor(Groupe, levels = c("Winter", "Static", "Summer")),
    week_factor  = factor(week, levels = c("4", "6", "8")),
    Shark_Id_factor = factor(Shark_Id),
    Sex_factor = factor(Sex)
  )

custom_colors <- c("Winter" = "#FFF5E6", 
                   "Static" = "#FDB888", 
                   "Summer" = "#B30000")

# ----------------------------
# 1) Fit LMM on ranks (for stats only)
# ----------------------------
Blood_count$Monocyte_rank <- rank(Blood_count$Monocyte_wbc)

lmm_monocyte_rank <- lmer(Monocyte_rank ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1|Shark_Id_factor),
                          data = Blood_count)

# Get emmeans for significance
emms_monocyte_rank <- emmeans(lmm_monocyte_rank, specs = ~ week_factor | Groupe_factor)
pairs_monocyte_rank <- pairs(emms_monocyte_rank, adjust = "bonferroni")

# ----------------------------
# 2) Prepare letters (from emmeans) for plotting
# ----------------------------
letters_week <- cld(emms_monocyte_rank, by = "week_factor", Letters = letters, adjust = "bonferroni") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(.group = gsub(" ", "", .group))


# ----------------------------
# 3) Compute positions using raw data
# ----------------------------
raw_stats <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(Groupe_factor, week_factor) %>%
  summarise(y_max = max(Monocyte_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
            y_min = min(Monocyte_wbc, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

# LOWER-CASE LETTERS (groups within weeks)
letters_week <- left_join(letters_week, raw_stats,
                          by = c("Groupe_factor", "week_factor")) %>%
  mutate(
    y_pos = y_max + 0.005 * y_max,
    y_pos = pmax(y_pos, 0.02),   # minimum = 0.02
    y_pos = pmin(y_pos, 0.087)    # maximum = 0.08
  )



# ----------------------------
# 4) Barplot on raw data
# ----------------------------
p_monocyte <- ggplot(Blood_count, aes(x = week_factor, y = Monocyte_wbc, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "summary", fun = "mean", position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(stat = "summary", fun.data = "mean_se",
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(data = letters_week,
            aes(x = week_factor, y = y_pos, label = .group, group = Groupe_factor),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), vjust = 0, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(x = "Week", y = "Monocyte (% WBC)", fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_monocyte)

```


```{r}
library(patchwork)

# Remove y-axis labels for right-column plots
p_GT_noy <- p_gt + labs(y = NULL)
p_CE_noy <- p_CE + labs(y = NULL)
p_mono_noy1 <- p_Monocyte1 + labs(y = NULL)

# Keep y-axis for left-column plots
p_lympho_y <- p_lympho
p_FE_y     <- p_fe
p_neutro_y <- p_neutro


library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
add_panel_letter <- function(p, letter){
  p + annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = letter, 
               hjust = -0.5, vjust = 1.5, size = 4, fontface = "bold")
}

# Apply to each plot
p_lympho_y   <- add_panel_letter(p_lympho, "Lymphocyte")
p_GT_noy     <- add_panel_letter(p_GT_noy, "G4")
p_FE_y       <- add_panel_letter(p_FE_y, "FEG")
p_CE_noy     <- add_panel_letter(p_CE_noy, "CEG")
p_neutro_y   <- add_panel_letter(p_neutro_y, "Neutrophil")
p_mono_noy1   <- add_panel_letter(p_mono_noy1, "Monocyte")

p_GT_noy     <- p_GT_noy     + theme(legend.position = "none")
p_CE_noy     <- p_CE_noy     + theme(legend.position = "none")
p_mono_noy1   <- p_mono_noy1   + theme(legend.position = "none")
p_FE_y       <- p_FE_y       + theme(legend.position = "none")
p_neutro_y   <- p_neutro_y   + theme(legend.position = "none")

# Keep legend only in p_lympho_y
p_lympho_y   <- p_lympho_y   + theme(legend.position = "right",
                                     legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = "white"))

# Combine
combined_plot1 <- (p_lympho_y | p_GT_noy) /
                 (p_FE_y     | p_CE_noy) /
                 (p_neutro_y | p_mono_noy1) +
                 plot_layout(guides = "collect")



# Combine
combined_plot1 <- (p_lympho_y | p_GT_noy) /
                 (p_FE_y | p_CE_noy) /
                 (p_neutro_y | p_mono_noy1) +
                 plot_layout(guides = "collect") & 
                 theme(legend.position = "right",
                       legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = "white"))

print(combined_plot1)

ggsave(
  filename = "Figure_combined_WBC_FINAL.png",  # change filename as needed
  plot = combined_plot1,
  width = 14,   # total width in inches
  height = 18,  # total height in inches
  dpi = 300     # high resolution
)

# Export as PDF
ggsave(
  filename = "Figure_combined_WBC_FINAL.pdf",
  plot = combined_plot1,
  width = 14,
  height = 18
)
```
